sentences.target: J’ai rendu ma copie trop tard.

translations.fr: J’ai rendu ma copie trop tard.
translations.en: I turned in my paper too late.
translations.de: Ich habe meine Arbeit zu spät abgegeben.
translations.it: Ho consegnato il compito troppo tardi.
translations.ru: Я сдал свою работу слишком поздно.
translations.nl: Ik heb mijn opdracht te laat ingeleverd.
translations.uk: Я здав свою роботу надто пізно.
translations.hu: Túl későn adtam be a dolgozatomat.
translations.hi: मैंने अपना पेपर बहुत देर से जमा किया।
translations.el: Παρέδωσα την εργασία μου πολύ αργά.
translations.nb: Jeg leverte inn oppgaven min for sent.
translations.sv: Jag lämnade in mitt arbete för sent.
translations.cs: Odevzdal jsem svou práci příliš pozdě.
translations.da: Jeg afleverede min opgave for sent.
translations.ja: レポートの提出が遅すぎました。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun j’ + auxiliary avoir (1st person singular, present); serves as auxiliary to form the compound past.
Past participle of the main verb; completes the compound past with the auxiliary.
Possessive determiner (1st person singular), feminine singular agreeing with the noun.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of the verb.
Degree adverb modifying the temporal adverb 'tard'.
Temporal adverb indicating lateness; modified by 'trop'.

sentences.target: Tu m’envoies une copie du mail.

translations.fr: Tu m’envoies une copie du mail.
translations.en: Please send me a copy of the email.
translations.es: Por favor, envíame una copia del correo electrónico.
translations.de: Bitte schick mir eine Kopie der E-Mail.
translations.it: Per favore, mandami una copia dell’email.
translations.zh-Hans: 请把那封邮件转发给我。
translations.yue: 麻煩你將嗰封電郵轉發畀我。
translations.pt: Por favor, envie-me uma cópia do e-mail.
translations.he: בבקשה שלח לי עותק של המייל.
translations.tr: Lütfen e-postanın bir kopyasını bana gönder.
translations.vi: Vui lòng gửi cho tôi một bản sao của email.
translations.ar: من فضلك أرسل لي نسخة من البريد الإلكتروني.
translations.nl: Stuur me alsjeblieft een kopie van de e-mail.
translations.uk: Будь ласка, надішли мені копію листа.
translations.hu: Kérlek, küldd el nekem az e-mail másolatát.
translations.hi: कृपया मुझे ईमेल की एक प्रति भेजें।
translations.el: Στείλε μου, παρακαλώ, ένα αντίγραφο του email.
translations.nb: Vennligst send meg en kopi av e-posten.
translations.id: Tolong kirimkan saya salinan email itu.
translations.sv: Skicka gärna en kopia av mejlet till mig.
translations.ro: Te rog să-mi trimiți o copie a e-mailului.
translations.da: Send mig venligst en kopi af e-mailen.
translations.ja: メールのコピーを送ってください。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Clitic object pronoun m’ (me, indirect object) + finite verb 'envoies' (2nd person singular, present of envoyer); main predicate.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, introducing the noun.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of the verb.
Contraction of preposition 'de' + definite article 'le'; introduces a noun complement.
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of the preposition 'du'.

sentences.target: On fait une copie pour le dossier.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ fɛ yn kɔpi puʁ lə dosje/

translations.fr: On fait une copie pour le dossier.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ fɛ yn kɔpi puʁ lə dosje/
translations.en: We’re making a copy for the file.
translations.es: Estamos haciendo una copia para el expediente.
translations.de: Wir machen eine Kopie für die Akte.
translations.it: Stiamo facendo una copia per il fascicolo.
translations.yue: 我哋為個檔案影印一份。
translations.pt: Estamos fazendo uma cópia para o arquivo.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang làm một bản sao cho hồ sơ.
translations.nl: We maken een kopie voor het dossier.
translations.hi: हम फाइल के लिए एक प्रति बना रहे हैं।
translations.el: Φτιάχνουμε ένα αντίγραφο για τον φάκελο.
translations.nb: Vi lager en kopi til mappen.
translations.sv: Vi gör en kopia till akten.
translations.da: Vi laver en kopi til sagen.
translations.ja: ファイル用にコピーを作っています。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/personal subject pronoun meaning 'one/we'; 3rd person singular agreement.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present.
Indefinite article, feminine singular.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'fait'.
Preposition introducing a purpose/beneficiary phrase.
Definite article, masculine singular.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: Ma copie est pleine de corrections.

translations.fr: Ma copie est pleine de corrections.
translations.en: My test paper is full of corrections.
translations.es: Mi examen está lleno de correcciones.
translations.it: Il mio compito è pieno di correzioni.
translations.pt: Minha prova está cheia de correções.
translations.vi: Bài kiểm tra của tôi đầy các chỉnh sửa.
translations.ar: ورقة الاختبار الخاصة بي مليئة بالتصحيحات.
translations.uk: Мій екзаменаційний аркуш увесь у виправленнях.
translations.hi: मेरा टेस्ट पेपर सुधारों से भरा है।
translations.el: Το διαγώνισμά μου είναι γεμάτο διορθώσεις.
translations.nb: Prøven min er full av rettelser.
translations.id: Kertas ujian saya penuh dengan koreksi.
translations.sv: Mitt prov är fullt av rättningar.
translations.ro: Lucrarea mea este plină de corecturi.
translations.da: Min prøve er fuld af rettelser.
translations.ja: テストの答案は訂正だらけです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1st person singular), feminine singular agreeing with 'copie'.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary (3rd person singular present) linking the subject to the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective, feminine singular agreeing with 'copie'.
Preposition introducing a complement.
Common noun, plural; object of the preposition 'de'.
